name: 天庭喜劇懸念型
description: 全劇以閻王得知女主懷孕後瘋狂給男主加壽命收尾，將凡間大團圓與天庭的慌亂形成喜劇反差。暗示故事並未結束——天庭仍在暗中干預，為可能的續集留下空間。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Oh no. That shevil is having a baby. What do we do? No. I need to extend her husband's lifespan. If he dies, then no one will be able to control that she devil. I'll add I'm adding adding adding more.
